structured.title: Vin Learns Gold and Kelsier's Plan
structured.overview: Kelsier and the crew discuss their strategy to destabilize the Final Empire by targeting the noble houses, especially House Venture, while using spies, aliases, and hidden cells of troops to prepare for a larger strike on the palace. Vin learns more about feruchemy from Kelsier and is given atium and metal advice before trying gold, which briefly shows her two versions of herself and leaves her shaken but curious about the power. The transcript also includes a brief McDonald’s order and some conversational banter, but the main thread is the crew’s rebellion planning and Vin’s discovery of gold’s effect.

transcript_segments.text: Then frowned, That sounds like a pretty big advantage. True, Kelsey or said. Reaching inside of his cloak and pulling out a vial containing several beads of Atium.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: But we have this. It doesn't matter if a ferrochemist is as strong as five men or as strong as 50 men. I know what he's going to do next, I'll beat him.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Vin nodded. Here. Kelsier said, unstopping the vial. Pulling out one of the beads. He took out another vial, this one filled with the normal L alcohol solution, and dropped the bead in it.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Check one of these You might need it. Tonight? Then asked accepting the vial. Calcio nodded. But it's just marsh. It might be, you said, Then again, maybe the obligators him and forced him to write that letter.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Maybe they're following him or maybe they've since captured him and have tortured him to find out about the meeting. Marsh is in a very dangerous place.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Think about trying to do the same thing you're doing at those balls. Except exchange all the noblemen for obligators and inquisitors.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Vin shivered. I guess you have a point, she said, tucking away the B2B team. You know, something must be wrong with me. I barely even stopped to think how much this stuff is worth anymore.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Calcior didn't respond immediately. I have trouble forgetting how much it's worth. He said quietly.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Hi.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_3

transcript_segments.text: Vin trilled off, rancing down at his hands. He usually wore long sleeved shirts and gloves now. His reputation was making it dangerous for his identifying scars to be visible in public.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: They knew they were there, however. Like thousands of tiny white scratches layered one over the other. Anyway, Calcio said, you're right about the logbook.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: I had hoped that it would mention the eleventh medal. But Alomancy isn't even mentioned in reference to Ferrakemi. Two powers are similar in many respects. You'd think that he would compare them.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Maybe he worried that someone would read the book and didn't want to give away that he was an alamancer. Kelsior nodded. Maybe, it's also possible that he hadn't snapped yet.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Whatever happened in those terrace mountains changed him from hero to tyrant. Maybe it also awakened his powers. We won't know, I guess, until Saves finishes his translation.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Is he close? Kelsey nodded. Just a bit left. The important bit, hopefully. I feel a little frustrated with the text so far. The Lord Ruler hasn't even told us what he is supposed to accomplish in those mountains.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: He claims that he's doing something to protect the entire world, but that might just be his ego coming through. He didn't seem very egotistical on the text to me, Ben thought. Kind of the opposite, actually.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Regardless, Kelsior said. We'll know more once the last few sections are translated. It was growing dark outside, and Vin to turn up her tin to see properly.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: The street outside her window grew visible, adopting a strange mix ture of shadow and luminance. That was the result of tin enhanced vision.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: She knew it was dark logically, yet she could still see. Not as she did in regular light, everything was muted. But it was sight nonetheless.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Kelsier checked his pocket watch. Along, Ben asked. Another half hour, Joshua said. Assuming he's on time, and I doubt he will be, he is my brother after all.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Vin nodded, shifting so that she leaned with arms crossed across the broken window sill. Though it was a very small thing, she felt a comfort in having the a t m Kelsey had given her.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: She paused. Thinking of ATM reminded her of something important. Something she'd been bothered by on several occasions. You never taught me the ninth medal, she accused, turning.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Calcier shrugged. I told you that it wasn't very important. Still, what is it? Some alloy of ATM, I assume? Gaucier shook his head.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: No. The last two metals don't follow the same pattern as the basic eight. The ninth metal is gold. Gold? Dan asked. That's it?
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: I could have tried it a long time ago on my own. Calcio chuckled. Assuming you wanted to, burning gold is a somewhat uncomfortable experience.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Ben narrowed her eyes, then turned to look back out the window. We'll see. She thought. You're going to try it anyway, aren't you? Kelsey said, smiling.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Then didn't respond. Calcio sighed, reaching into his sash and pulling out her golden unboxing. A file. You should probably get one of these, he said, holding up the file.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: However, if you collect a medal yourself, burn just a tiny bit first to make certain that it's pure or alloyed correctly.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: If it then asked. You'll know if promised. Beginning to file away at the coin. Remember that headache you had from the pewter dragging?
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Yes.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_1

transcript_segments.text: Bad metal is worse, Calcior said. Far worse. Your metals when you can. In every city, you'll find a small group of merchants who provide powdered metals to Alamancers.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Those merchants have a vested interest in making so certain that all of their metals are pure. A grumpy mistborn with a headache isn't exactly the kind of slighted customer one wants to do with.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Kelcier finished filing Right. Then collected a few flakes of gold on a small square of cloth. He stuck one on a finger, then swallowed it.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: This is good, he said, handing her the cloth. Go ahead. Just remember. Burning the ninth medal is a strange experience. Vin nodded, suddenly feeling a bit apprehensive.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: You'll never know if you don't try it for yourself, she thought. Then dump the dust like flakes into her mouth. She washed them down with a bit of water from her flask.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: A new metal reserve appeared within her. Unfamiliar and different from the nine she knew. She looked up at calcissor, took a breath, and burned gold.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: She was in two places at once. She could see herself, she could see herself. One of her was a strange woman changed and transformed from the girl she had always been.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: That girl had been careful and cautious. A girl who had never brand a familiar metal based solely on the wood of one man. This woman was foolish.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: She had forgotten many of the things that had better survived so long. She drank from cups prepared by others, fraternized with strangers.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: She didn't keep track of the people around her. She was still far more careful than most people. But she had lost so much. The other her was something she had always secretly loved.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: A child, really. Then to the point of exploring this, she was lonely, hateful, and untrusting. She loved no one, and no one loved her.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: She always told herself quietly that she didn't care. Was there something worth living for? There had to be. Life couldn't be as pathetic as it seemed.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Yet it had to be. There wasn't anything else. Then was both. She stood in two places, moving both bodies, being both girl and woman.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: She reached out with hesitant, uncertain hands, one each, and touched herself on the faces, one each. Then gasped, and it was gone.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: She felt a sudden rush of emotions. A sense of worthlessness and confusion. There were no chairs in the room, so she simply squatted to the ground.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Sitting with her back to the wall, knees pulled up, arms wrapped around them. Calcior walked over, squatting down to lay a hand on her shoulder.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: It's alright. What was that? She whispered. Golden a t m are compliments. Like the other metal pairs, Kelsior said. ATM lets you see marginally into the future.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Gold works in a similar way. But it lets you see into the past. Or at least it gives you a glimpse of another version of yourself.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: That things been different in the past. Been shivered. The experience of being both people at once of seeing herself twice over had been disturbingly eerie.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Her body still shook, and her mind didn't feel right anymore. Fortunately, the sensation seemed to be fading. Remind me to listen to you in the future, she said.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

transcript_segments.text: Or at least when you talk about alomancy, Calcier chuckled. I tried to put it out of your mind for as long as possible. But you had to try it sometime.
transcript_segments.speaker: SPEAKER_2

apps_results.content:
## Driving lesson and road position
- Discussed stopping sooner for safety and speed
- Explained right-of-way and traffic flow
- Talk got tense; ended with disagreement

## House war strategy
- Focus shifted to noble houses, not garrison
- Goal: weaken top houses and economy
- Use aliases, spies, bad information

## Training troops and recruitment
- 2,000 men need hiding and retraining
- Split troops into small secret groups
- Ham tasked with recruiting more soldiers

## Marsh message and meeting
- Marsh sent a message and meeting location
- Kelsier went to check before dark
- Crew kept working on the plan

## Metals, powers, and Vin’s discovery
- Discussed feruchemy limits and strengths
- Kelsier gave Vin atium and gold
- Gold showed two selves; unsettling but useful

## Next steps
- Gather more troops in coming months
- Spread unrest before Lord Ruler holds city
- Wait for more of the logbook translation
